title: Feng Zhong Zhi Ta
synopsis:
After the end of the world, trees, lakes and oceans are taken place by rampant sand storm as well as ferocious snow. Human beings and animals all disappeared. What’s still alive are the tribe of dreadful monsters and the piercing cold. 

The very last human being in the world is an old man, whose life is hanging loosely on top of the tower in the air built by him. During the day, he has to climb all the way down to a very far place in order to get a bucket of water that looks like mud, which is then filtered for drinking; while at night, the tower in the air is his lonely hidden place, in which he’s supposed to be safe from the attack of those ferocious monsters.

But one day, the monsters climb up to the tower in the air and attacked him all of a sudden. The old man picks up his guns and shoots back to protect his life. At the moment when he losts all the weapons, the tower in the air collapses under the weight of the group of monsters.

(Source: Real Wood YouTube Channel)
